mundo.titulo: Chaos after building collapses on Caracas outskirts
mundo.resumen: The capital and its surrounding areas have seen some of the worst damage from the 7.2 and 7.5 quakes, which hit a minute apart.

mundo.titulo: Europe's heatwave shifts east as France raises health alert to highest level
mundo.resumen: Temperatures in Germany could hit 40C in some areas while French officials say deaths linked to the heat are being seen among young people.

mundo.titulo: TikTok influencer charged with Dubai murder
mundo.resumen: Influencer Brooke George, 23, from Kent, claims she acted in self defence in stabbing her partner.

mundo.titulo: Ryanair says it will reluctantly not charge parents to sit next to children
mundo.resumen: The airline had typically charged adults a fee of £8 each way to sit with their young children.

mundo.titulo: How brands banned from the World Cup became the story
mundo.resumen: When we try to suppress something, we often make it more visible - and Fifa is living that in real time with its sponsors.

mundo.titulo: Jail time and unlimited fines planned under conversion practices ban
mundo.resumen: The government says a new Bill will protect LGBT people from "abusive acts" to change who they are.

negocios.titulo: Ryanair says it will reluctantly not charge parents to sit next to children
negocios.resumen: The airline had typically charged adults a fee of £8 each way to sit with their young children.

negocios.titulo: Oil price falls back to pre-Iran war levels
negocios.resumen: Signs that traffic through the key Strait of Hormuz shipping route is gradually resuming has helped to push the oil price down.

negocios.titulo: How you can save money on your energy bill as debts rise
negocios.resumen: Experts say support is available as total debt and arrears to suppliers hit a new record.

negocios.titulo: Reeves urges Burnham to 'stick to what I'm doing' on economy
negocios.resumen: The chancellor throws her support behind the MP for Makerfield despite reports he could demote her if he becomes PM.

negocios.titulo: I've spent 30 years in recruitment - this is how to get a job
negocios.resumen: The recruitment agency boss shares his tips on getting noticed in a tougher jobs market.

negocios.titulo: The legal fight to get equal pay for Germany's disabled workers
negocios.resumen: A test case is seeking the minimum wage for 300,000 disabled people who currently get paid less.

tecnologia.titulo: Amazon ups India bet with fresh $13B AI infrastructure investment
tecnologia.resumen: Amazon’s latest India investment comes as global tech companies race to expand AI infrastructure in the country.

tecnologia.titulo: Cellebrite said it cut off Russia, but Russia used is tools anyway
tecnologia.resumen: Security researchers found evidence that Russian authorities hacked the iPhone of a political opponent using a phone-unlocking device made by Cellebrite, even after the company said it would stop selling to Putin’s government.

tecnologia.titulo: Europe is pushing back on Washington’s chip war
tecnologia.resumen: As ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet told TechCrunch in May, what China can currently buy are older-generation deep ultraviolet tools — gear first shipped about a decade ago — the same machines the MATCH Act would now put off-limits.

tecnologia.titulo: Former Infosys chief has a new startup that wants to challenge the IT services world
tecnologia.resumen: Backed by Mayfield and Aramco Ventures, Vishal Sikka’s new venture brings together veterans from SAP, Infosys, and VianAI.

tecnologia.titulo: Elon suffers another day short of trillionaire status
tecnologia.resumen: Right now he's merely a several-hundred-billionaire, according to Bloomberg's Billionaires Index.

tecnologia.titulo: Cerebras stock plunges after earnings as CEO says margin outlook was misunderstood
tecnologia.resumen: In its first earnings report since going public, the AI chipmaker forecast a narrower gross margin in its core business, scaring investors.

tecnologia.titulo: Leica’s $6,690 SL3-P pairs 44-megapixel stills with 8K video
tecnologia.resumen: Following the launch of the SL3 in 2024 and last year's SL3-S that was optimized for speed and capturing fast moving subjects, Leica announced the new SL3-P today delivering some of the best features from both of its predecessors. Like Leica's previous "P" variants, the new SL3-P lacks the brand's iconic and recognizable red dot […]

tecnologia.resumen: There are some some sizable discounts on new and recent hits from the last few years for the Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 5, and the Xbox Series X / S for Prime Day. tecnologia.titulo: Apple reveals price hikes for MacBooks and iPads
tecnologia.resumen: Apple is hiking prices in response to the ongoing memory shortage. On Thursday, the company adjusted the price of its new MacBook Neo, which will now start at $699 instead of $599, while the base MacBook Air will jump to $1,299 from $1,099, as reported earlier by Bloomberg. The 14-inch MacBook Pro is getting an […]

tecnologia.titulo: Ford had to hire back former engineers to fix mistakes made by its automated systems
tecnologia.resumen: To celebrate its new status as No. 1 in JD Power's initial quality ranking among mainstream automakers, Ford is opening up about the challenges it has faced in recent years, especially around its reliance on automated systems in production and design. It turns out that those automated systems were not as robust as previously assumed, […]

tecnologia.titulo: Disney agrees to pay $50 million to YouTube TV and DirecTV subscribers
tecnologia.resumen: YouTube TV and DirecTV Stream customers may be eligible for a cash payout, after Disney agreed to pay $50 million to settle claims that it forced the services to increase their subscription prices. Anyone who was subscribed to YouTube TV or DirecTV Stream between April 1st, 2019, and March 31st, 2026 is eligible to claim […]

tecnologia.titulo: The 124 best tech deals for day three of Prime Day
tecnologia.resumen: It’s day three of Prime Day, folks. We’re nearly 75 percent of the way through Amazon’s four-day sales event, and unsurprisingly, many deals are still sticking around.
